title: Pet Import Guide: United Arab Emirates
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to United Arab Emirates. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: United Arab Emirates
overview: Importing a pet to United Arab Emirates is moderately strict. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before rabies vaccination
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Pets from certain non-approved or high-risk countries
import_requirements.import_permit: Required. Import permit MUST be obtained before travel. Different emirates have different application processes. Allow 1-2 weeks for processing.
import_requirements.health_certificate: Veterinary health certificate / Official health certificate. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Import requirements for United Arab Emirates
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before rabies vaccination

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Pets from certain non-approved or high-risk countries

**Quarantine:** Not required (penalty quarantine if non-compliant)

**Import Permit:** Required. Import permit MUST be obtained before travel. Different emirates have different application processes. Allow 1-2 weeks for processing.

**Health Certificate:** Veterinary health certificate / Official health certificate. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in United Arab Emirates
sections.body: Governed by: Federal Law + emirate-level regulations

sections.heading: Routes to United Arab Emirates
sections.body:
We have detailed guides for the following routes:

- [United Kingdom to United Arab Emirates](/routes/united-kingdom-to-united-arab-emirates/)

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter United Arab Emirates?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Is there quarantine in United Arab Emirates?
Which airlines fly pets to United Arab Emirates?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to United Arab Emirates. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
